title: Senior Node.js Developer
jd_text:
Tech Innovations Inc. is a forward-thinking technology company based in New York, specializing in developing cutting-edge software solutions for various industries. We are dedicated to fostering a diverse and inclusive work environment. We are currently seeking a Senior Nodejs Developer to join our dynamic team. 

Key Responsibilities:
- Design, develop and maintain scalable applications using Node.js.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features.
- Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code.
- Troubleshoot, debug applications, and conduct peer code reviews.

Required Skills:
- Extensive experience in Node.js development.
- Proficiency in RESTful APIs and microservices architecture.
- Familiarity with databases like MongoDB or PostgreSQL.
- Strong problem-solving skills and an ability to work independently.

Nice to have:
- Experience with cloud services (AWS/Azure).
- Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines.
- Familiarity with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).

Benefits:
- Competitive salary of $120,000 - $150,000 per year.
- Health, dental, and vision insurance.
- Generous PTO and flexible working hours.
- Opportunities for professional development and growth.

Tech Innovations Inc. is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

title: Junior Nodejs Developer
jd_text:
Web Solutions Group is an industry leader in web development services with a vibrant office located in San Francisco. We pride ourselves on our innovative solutions and a collaborative work environment. We are looking for a Junior Nodejs Developer to help us build the next generation of web applications.

Responsibilities:
- Collaborate with senior developers to create applications using nodejs.
- Assist in maintaining and improving existing applications.
- Participate in code reviews and team meetings.

Required Qualifications:
- Familiarity with NodeJavascript and related frameworks.
- Understanding of front-end technologies (HTML, CSS).
- Exposure to version control systems (Git).

Preferred Skills:
- Experience with GraphQL.
- Working knowledge of SQL databases.

Benefits:
- Salary of £35,000 per year or $50,000 in USD.
- Remote work flexibility.
- Health, life insurance and wellness programs.
- Regular team-building activities.

Web Solutions Group is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are dedicated to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

title: Senior Frontend Engineer
jd_text:
Tech Innovations Ltd. is a leading provider of cutting-edge software solutions with a focus on enhancing user experience through innovative technology. Our team is composed of passionate individuals who are dedicated to pushing the boundaries of what’s possible. We are looking for a Senior Frontend Engineer with strong JS/TS skills and a deep understanding of AI/ML applications. 

**Responsibilities:**
- Develop and maintain high-quality software applications.
- Collaborate with UX designers, backend developers, and AI experts.
- Create efficient, reusable code.
- Handle technical challenges and propose effective solutions.

**Required Skills:**
- Proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript.
- Experience with machine learning algorithms and AI frameworks.
- Familiarity with React or Angular.

**Nice to Have:**
- Knowledge of python.
- Previous work with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure).

At Tech Innovations, we value diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We are an equal opportunity employer and encourage applicants from all backgrounds to apply.

**Benefits Include:**
- Competitive salary of £70,000 per year (around $90,000).
- Flexible working hours.
- Health and wellness programs.
- Opportunities for professional development and training.

Join us to be part of a team that’s shaping the future of technology!

title: AI/ML Software Developer
jd_text:
NextGen Solutions Inc. is revolutionizing the tech landscape with our innovative AI-driven products. Our mission is to harness the power of artificial intelligence to create solutions that empower businesses worldwide. We are on the lookout for an AI/ML Software Developer who has a solid foundation in JS/TS and a proven track record in AI/ML.

**Key Responsibilities:**
- Design and implement AI models using JavaScript and TypeScript.
- Work closely with data scientists to refine algorithms.
- Develop user interfaces that integrate seamlessly with AI functionalities.
- Troubleshoot and optimize existing code.

**Essential Qualifications:**
- Expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript.
- Demonstrated experience in AI/ML development.
- Knowledge of front-end frameworks such as Vue.js or Svelte.

**Desirable Skills:**
- Familiarity with Java.
- Basic understanding of Docker.

At NextGen Solutions, we firmly believe in equal opportunity. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. 

**What We Offer:**
- Salary of £80,000 annually (approx. $95,000).
- Generous vacation policy.
- Remote work options available.
- Career advancement opportunities and access to training programs.

Be part of our journey in building transformative technology!

title: Senior Software Engineer - AI/ML
jd_text:
We are seeking a highly skilled Senior Software Engineer with expertise in Node.js and AI/ML technologies to join our dynamic team at Innovatech Solutions. Our company is at the forefront of developing cutting-edge technology that transforms industries. You will work closely with data scientists and product managers to create intelligent, scalable applications that leverage machine learning algorithms. 

Key Responsibilities:
- Design, develop, and maintain applications using Node.js.
- Implement AI/ML models to enhance product features.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.
- Conduct code reviews and mentor junior developers.

Required Skills:
- Strong experience with Node.js.
- Proficiency in AI/ML frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch).
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure).
- Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

Nice to have:
- Experience with python or Java.

At Innovatech Solutions, we pride ourselves on our mission to drive innovation in every aspect of our work. While our office is located in the vibrant city of London, we also welcome remote applicants from various locations. 

We are an equal opportunity employer and welcome applicants from all backgrounds to apply. We offer competitive salaries (up to £70,000 + $90,000), comprehensive health benefits, flexible working hours, and opportunities for professional development.

title: AI/ML Engineer
jd_text:
DataWave Technologies is looking for an AI/ML Engineer to join our fast-paced team. This role requires someone with solid experience in Nodejs and a passion for artificial intelligence and machine learning. In this position, you will be responsible for developing innovative solutions that harness the power of AI to provide insights and improve user experiences. 

Primary Responsibilities:
- Develop and maintain server-side applications using Node.js.
- Work on AI/ML model deployment and performance tuning.
- Partner with product teams to define and design new features.

Qualifications:
- Solid experience in Node.js development.
- Background in AI/ML – familiarity with algorithms and data processing is essential.
- Knowledge of database technologies (MongoDB, PostgreSQL). 

Bonus points for:
- Experience with React or Angular (not required).

At DataWave Technologies, we believe in harnessing data to unlock the future of technology. Our headquarters are situated in Manchester, but we are open to candidates across the UK. 

We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We offer a competitive salary (£60,000 - £75,000), generous vacation policy, and opportunities for career growth and development.

title: Full Stack AI Developer
jd_text:
InnovateTech Solutions is a cutting-edge technology firm specializing in AI-driven solutions. We're seeking a Full Stack AI Developer to join our dynamic team. As a developer, you will work on building applications using NodeJS and javascript/TypeScript, with an emphasis on AI, Machine Learning, and Large Language Models. Your role will involve:
- Designing and implementing scalable applications
- Collaborating closely with product teams,
- Integrating ML models into our services. 

Required skills:
- Proficiency in Node.js and JavaScript/TypeScript
- Extensive experience with AI/ML/LLM technologies
- Solid understanding of cloud services like AWS or Azure.

*Nice to have: react, PYTHON, SQL.*

We offer competitive salaries starting at £55,000 but also consider USD 70,000 for the right candidate. Our benefits include:
- Flexible working hours
- Health insurance
- Professional development opportunities.

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. All employment is decided based on qualifications, merit, and business needs.

- Mentor junior developers
- Work on integrating large language models.

Must-have skills:
- Expertise in Node.js and JavaScript/TypeScript
- In-depth knowledge of AI/ML/LLM

*Nice to have: Docker, Kubernetes.*

Salary range is £70,000 - £90,000 but candidates from abroad might be offered €80,000. Benefits include:
- Equity options
- Remote work flexibility
- Comprehensive health and wellness programs.

We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.
